# Resonance Ventures

> Resonance Ventures LLC is a Colorado venture studio (est. 2026) that builds and operates
> software and live experiences for the long term.

Resonance Ventures is the parent studio for its own products, including Drop, an EDM
event-discovery app. This site is the company's corporate homepage — not a product with
its own pricing or docs.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://resonance-ventures.com/): studio overview, what we do, current work, contact.
- [Drop](https://trydropapp.com): flagship product, EDM event-discovery app.

## Contact

- Email: arya@resonance-ventures.com
